## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Superhuman and GrowthX to discuss ongoing projects, team updates, and SEO strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is testing new meeting transcription solutions to replace Fathom, aiming for better API integration and data analysis capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [GrowthX is changing their content manager model to 2 accounts per manager for deeper engagement and adding more team members.](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [SEO indexing limits in Google Search Console (GSC) were discussed, along with potential workarounds and the importance of Bing indexing for AI snippets.](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

## Topics

### New Meeting Transcription Solution

  - [Exploring alternatives to Fathom for better API integration](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Goal: Extract rich info from meeting transcripts for sentiment analysis and other insights](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Potential to leverage new team members' technical skills for data analysis](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### GrowthX Team Expansion

  - [4 new team members started this week](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [More hires planned for coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Rebranding "Content Managers" to "Company Managers"](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [New model: 2 accounts per manager for deeper engagement](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Plan to add another person to Superhuman's account](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

### SEO Indexing Strategies

  - [GSC indexing limit of 10 URL submissions per day per profile encountered](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Historical context: API submissions might allow for higher daily limits](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Potential to create a workflow for programmatic submissions if needed](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Discussion on the importance of Bing indexing for AI snippets (OpenAI connection)](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Suggestion to gather team opinions on Bing indexing strategy](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### Client-Specific Challenges

  - [Difficulty with Smith account due to extensive existing content](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Frequent rejection of new ideas presenting a challenge](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore building a workflow for programmatic URL submissions to GSC if needed](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Discuss Bing indexing strategy with the SEO team](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Follow up on potential collaboration with Branko for programmatic approaches](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Continue onboarding new team members and implementing the new content manager model](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Investigate the connection between Bing indexing and AI snippets for potential strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/79QrCHu7_G9yz7HzsobHskfnM-D_ukaJ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
